windows.title: SISCO - Sistema de Control de Cochera

security.csp: default-src 'self' http://localhost:5173 http://127.0.0.1:5173 https://sisco-production.up.railway.app; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:5173 http://127.0.0.1:5173 ws://localhost:5173 ws://127.0.0.1:5173 https://sisco-production.up.railway.app; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: http://localhost:5173 http://127.0.0.1:5173 https://sisco-production.up.railway.app
